name: todo
description: EXPERIMENT (issue #9): optional one-command dev startup for BOTH the API and the SPA. NOT part of the take-home submission scope. Normal workflow is VS F5 (or `dotnet run`) for the API + `cd frontend && npm run dev` for the SPA.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "dotnet run --project backend/ToDoApi" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
